title: AI Marketing Document Collaboration Tools Review: Google Docs vs Notion vs Confluence for Small Business - 2026
description: Review Google Docs, Notion, Confluence, and other AI marketing document collaboration tools for team editing and version control. Find the best marketing c.
content:

Recommendations

For small businesses, choose Notion for small business friendly features. For best Document Collaboration, choose Google Docs. For analysis, choose Confluence. For enterprise, choose Coda. We recommend Notion for small businesses combined with Google Docs for best Document Collaboration, for optimal results.
